name: post-processor
responsibility: Post-process downloaded HTML mockups to ensure self-containment and correctness. Three operations: font family patching, external asset inlining (images to base64), and responsive CSS verification/injection.

api_detail.method: Runs all three operations in sequence: patchFonts → inlineAssets → verifyResponsive
Regex replace all font-family declarations in <style> blocks and inline styles. Replaces Google Fonts (Inter, Roboto, etc.) with target font stack.
Find all and url('http...') references. Download each, convert to base64 data URI, replace in HTML. Skip failed downloads and log.
Check if HTML contains @media queries or @container queries. If neither found, inject a basic responsive meta viewport tag and breakpoint CSS (max-width adjustments at 768px, 480px).

fields.name: assetsInlined
fields.constraints: number of external assets converted to base64

fields.name: responsiveInjected
fields.constraints: true if responsive CSS was injected

nfr_constraints.performance: Font patching < 100ms. Asset inlining < 30s (network-bound, parallel downloads). Responsive check < 100ms.
nfr_constraints.security: Only download from HTTPS URLs. No execution of downloaded content.
